title: Unlimited Enchantments
description:
A configurable Fabric Mod that removes enchantment level limits.
Also no more "too expensive" items.
body:
## Features
- Combine enchantments beyond the vanilla cap (e.g. Sharpness 5 + Sharpness 5 → Sharpness 6)
  → Supports levels up to 255
- Removes the “Too Expensive!” restriction — anvil operations now cap at your configured max cost
- Removes `/enchant` command limits

## Config Options
- Max enchantment level — set your own enchantment level limit
- Max anvil cost — define the maximum experience cost of the anvil

## Dependencies:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Mod Menu (optional)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
